summary: Fixed all five critical bugs: (1) Added sanitizeModelOutput() in MarkdownContent.tsx that strips <script>, <iframe>, <object>, <embed>, <form> tags and on* event handler attributes from model output before it reaches the markdown renderer — defense-in-depth on top of the existing DOMPurify+html:false safeguards. (2) Wrapped CommandOutputRow's setInterval inside createEffect so the timer only starts when isRunning() is true, preventing a spurious interval (and at least one pointless setElapsed call) on mount for already-completed tool calls. (3) Added a completedDuration signal to ThinkingRow that captures the elapsed wall-clock time at the exact moment isStreaming transitions to false; the duration() memo now returns this captured value for completed messages instead of recomputing Date.now()-startTime at memo evaluation time (which was always near-zero). (4) Added a pendingContent variable to MarkdownContent's throttle logic; every content update always writes to pendingContent so the timer always reads the most recent value even when it was scheduled before the last token arrived, preventing the final streamed token from being silently dropped. (5) Changed LiveStreamingBlock's fallback thinking-segment join from empty string '' to double newline '\n\n', preserving visual boundaries between distinct reasoning rounds.
